items.headline: Supreme Court ruling eviscerates Voting Rights Act protection for minority districts
items.body: The court struck down Louisiana's congressional map in a decision that allows states to draw districts diluting minority voting power. Black voters across America could lose districts that provided fair representation for decades.

items.headline: White House Correspondents' Dinner shooting suspect charged with attempted assassination
items.body: Cole Tomas Allen faces life imprisonment after arrest near the banquet hall screening area. He intended to target multiple Trump administration officials at the event.

items.headline: United States commits one hundred million dollars for Chornobyl containment emergency repairs
items.body: Washington will fund twenty percent of restoration needed after a Russian drone strike damaged the radiation shield. The strike created immediate contamination risk across Ukraine and neighboring countries.

items.headline: South Korean court adds seven years to ousted president Yoon's life sentence
items.body: The appeals court convicted Yoon for obstructing justice before his December 2024 martial law declaration. The ruling extends punishment for the country's worst democratic crisis in decades.
